name: Bestselling Sea World Resort Ultimate Family Fun for Four Guests with Unlimited Entry to Four Theme Parks & Resort Credits
description:
Treat the family to the ultimate Gold Coast adventure with a stay at Sea World Resort, located on the glittering Gold Coast’s Main Beach. The sun-drenched Gold Coast has it all: iconic beaches, activities for all ages, gorgeous hinterland trails, a plethora of theme parks and top-notch dining – and you’ll soon discover why this tropical city has long been synonymous with family escapes. Get ready for hours of fun-filled entertainment at Sea World, located right next to the resort. Discover adrenaline-pumping action at The New Atlantis, Sea World's newest and most immersive entertainment precinct – experience sky-high thrills on wooden coaster The Leviathan, brave the colossal currents of the Vortex and defy gravity as you spin 42 metres in the air on Trident.

Little ones can enjoy meet-and-greets with Nickelodeon characters while the whole family can splash through the water park and experience a host of fun animal adventures. Then, adults can unwind at Sea World Resort Relaxation Corporation, the luxurious onsite spa. At the end of the day, kick back at the award-winning Hatsuhana Japanese Restaurant, pull up a seat at Shoreline Restaurant for bites inspired by the ocean, feast on mouthwatering fare at Melrose Italian, or soak up some sun at Boatshed Bar & Grill.

copy.additionalDescription: **Exclusive Travelshoot Upgrade:** Forget about low-quality selfies, awkward poses and out-of-focus images — this exclusive 30-minute professional photoshoot experience is a unique way to capture the natural, candid and heartwarming moments of your Gold Coast escape together as a family.

copy.finePrint:
**Update 3 April 2023, 4.55pm AEDT: Travelshoot information updated, please see below.**

Valid for travel until 21 June 2024 (bookings must be made before 21 April 2024).

**Blackout Dates Apply.** Dates are identified in the Booking Calendar.

**Surcharge:** A non-refundable surcharge per room, per night, applies for certain dates and is payable at the time of booking. Dates and prices are identified in the Booking Calendar.

Package Inclusions: Inclusions are correct at the time of purchase. Refer to your booking confirmation for details.

**Check Availability:** To confirm your dates of stay at purchase, click on 'Check Availability' and select your preferred package. Use the calendar to browse and select available dates. Dates with a surcharge are identified.

**Buy Now, Choose Dates Later:** If you want to secure this offer and don't know when you want to travel please select 'Buy Now, Choose Dates Later'. This will secure your package and give you the flexibility to choose your travel dates — within the book by and validity period and subject to availability. To select dates post purchase, simply select 'My Escapes' under the 'My Account' tab and follow the prompts.

**7-Day Change of Mind ‘No Questions Asked’ Refund Guarantee:** Things don’t always work out. Our 7-day Change of Mind Guarantee is there to help. Bookings (except for cruise bookings, flights and deposit fee, if applicable, which are subject to the cancellation terms of the relevant supplier) may be cancelled with a full refund provided that cancellation occurs strictly within 7 days from the date of purchase and provided that the cancellation is made no less than 14 days prior to the check-in date.

**Flexible Cancellation:** You can cancel your booking for credit up until **21** days prior to the original check-in date. This can be done via self-service in your ‘My Escapes’ account. Your credit will be valid for 12 months from the date of cancellation. Credits are not transferable and cannot be redeemed for cash.

Please note this does not apply to flights booked with us. Flight fulfilment is provided by the airline(s) selected at the time of finalising the booking. For your air travel, you are bound by the terms and conditions and fare rules of the selected airline(s).

**Date Changes:** If you need to amend your booking, you can self-service unlimited date changes in your ‘My Escapes’ account up until 21 days before your original check-in date. If you can't find a suitable date, or still need further assistance, please contact our 24/7 customer service team. Subject to availability and surcharges.

**Please Note:**

- Dining inclusions do not include drinks (unless otherwise stated). Menus are subject to change without notice.
- **Dining Credit:** The included food credit must be used during your stay. Any unused credit will be forfeited and is not transferable or redeemable for cash.
- **Kids eat breakfast free:** Kids (13 and under) eat a free buffet breakfast with every full paying adult. Valid at Shoreline Restaurant only.
- **'Hop On, Hop Off' day pass:** One free child 'Hop on, Hop Off' day pass will be provided only with the purchase of a Family Day Pass.
- **Complimentary drink with drink purchase:** Complimentary drink must be a house wine, beer or cocktail of equal or lesser value to purchased drink, and is applicable to the Ultimate Menu options only valid at selected onsite restaurants and bars throughout the resort. Not valid for in-room dining.
- **A$50 Animal Adventures credit:** Can be redeemed against any one Animal Adventures activity and is not transferable for cash and must be used during stay. Unused credit is non-refundable. Excludes special needs programs and glass-bottom boat tours. Certain criteria must be met to participate in each of the Animal Adventures programs. They are strictly enforced to ensure the safety of guests, staff and animals. All participation is subject to final assessment by the Marine Sciences staff member at the time of attendance and all conditions and/or information are subject to change without notice Not valid during blackout periods. [Find out more here](https://seaworld.com.au/attractions?attraction-type=animal-adventure). To reserve call 133 386.
- **A$20 retail credit:** Only redeemable within the stay period for non-consignment items and cannot be used in conjunction with any other discounted offer and cannot be combined. Valid for participating retail gift shops at Sea World, Warner Bros. Movie World, Wet’n’Wild and Paradise Country gift shops. Not valid on mobile carts within theme parks. Must be used in a single transaction.
- **Two A$10 massage and beauty credit:** Only redeemable within the stay period and cannot be used in conjunction with any other discounted offer and cannot be combined. Advanced booking required. Massages must be prepaid for a minimum of one hour of massage or beauty treatment, appointments between 11am and 3pm. No refunds for no-shows or cancellations with less than 12 hours notice. To reserve call 0415 751 751.
- **10% off selected food and drinks at Sea World, Warner Bros. Movie World, Wet’n’Wild and Paradise Country**: Applicable to selected food and drinks in park by presenting guests’ Family Holiday Pass to redeem. Offer excludes mobile food and drinks carts throughout the parks.
- **20% off Australian Outback Spectacular’s Heartland tickets:** advance bookings essential on 133 386 quoting your resort reservation number.
- Hatsuhana Japanese Restaurant 15% discount is applicable with a  minimum spend of $30. Valid for full price menu only.
- One A$20 TopGolf gameplay voucher per package and a Lifetime Membership per person valued at A$5 per person. Must be redeemed during the stay period. Not valid with any other promotions or discounts. Present Holiday Pass on arrival at TopGolf.
- Sea World Cruises discounted fares are available for purchase [here](https://seaworldcruises.com.au/swr-ultimate-deal/).
- All discounts and inclusions cannot be used in conjunction with any other discounted offer, are redeemable only within the Resort stay period, are not valid during blackout dates and unused credit is not redeemable for cash. All activities and services are subject to availability. A Family Holiday Pass will be provided at check-in and must be presented when redeeming discounts and inclusions. Please note the Resort terms and conditions found [here](https://seaworld.com.au/resort/resort-info/terms-and-conditions). The person who makes the reservation will be deemed to have accepted these terms and conditions on behalf of all persons staying under that reservation at the Resort.

**Travelshoot 30-Minute Professional Photoshoot**

**Inclusions:**

- Session time and the album of edited professional photos post the photoshoot
- Access to a client gallery – a private online gallery to view, share and download images
- Online access to meet and communicate with your photographer before the shoot
- All photos provided in high-resolution format
- The 30-minute experience includes one location and 20 edited images provided within 7 days

**Fine Print:**

- Travelshoot will email you within 1-2 business days to book in your desired date.
- Rates are for up to eight people
- Infants of all ages may attend and are included in group numbers.
- This experience does not include: any physical photo product (images are provided online to download).
- A car or other transportation is not included.

**How it works:**

- Before the shoot: be connected with a recommended photographer online, see samples of their work, and communicate any special requests with them before your photoshoot.
- Choose from two locations for your Travelshoot – Enjoy a convenient shoot in the resort with the beautiful backdrop of the Gold Coast Broadwater – the shoot will take place at the garden terrace, Boatshed and marina (or splash around in the Aqua Play!); or pop across to Main Beach (approx. 500m walking distance from the resort) for some stunning shots amongst the sand and sea.
- Photoshoot day: your photographer will meet you at the agreed time, and guide you through your experience with the focus on being yourselves – fun, natural and candid memories!
- Receive your photos: samples within 48 hours, and the full album in seven days! You will be emailed a link to a private online gallery where you can view, share and download your high-resolution photos.
- Rates are for up to eight people and for leisure purposes only (and are not bookable for a commercial purpose).

**Important:** The hotel, transportation and/or destination you are travelling to may have health, insurance and vaccination requirements in place. Please ensure you stay up to date with any requirements prior to your departure.

The property, facilities and dining are subject to government regulations and restrictions. Please check the property website for the most up-to-date information as some of the services may be impacted.

We reserve the right to modify prices for marketing and commercial reasons. Please note that full terms and conditions apply. Refer to the website's terms and conditions.

*Images are for illustrative purposes and may not be reflective of the package purchased. See individual offers and packages for details.
copy.gettingThere: Sea World Resort is located on the Gold Coast, and this buzzing city is jam-packed with ways to spend your day. It’s almost impossible to run out of things to do: take a day trip to the Gold Coast hinterland to visit wineries and beautiful national parks, shop your heart out at Pacific Fair Shopping Centre or surf on the world-famous beaches. The resort is approximately a 40-minute drive from Gold Coast Airport (OOL). Airport transfers are not included in your package, please plan accordingly.
copy.highlights:
**The Resort – Family-friendly fun on the Gold Coast with unlimited theme park entry**

Welcome to the ‘Theme Park Capital’ of Australia with a stay in the heart of the action at Sea World Resort, located on the Gold Coast’s Main Beach. Step into the newly refreshed lobby, then choose from multiple dining options to ensure you’ll keep everyone happy without needing to leave the comfort of the resort. Be spoilt for choice with authentic Japanese at Hatsuhana Japanese Restaurant, international dishes and seafood at Shoreline Restaurant, à la carte meals at The Lobby Lounge, local classics at Boatshed Bar & Grill and casual dining at the poolside Waterfall Café.

The resort offers fun for all ages, including meet-and-greets with Nickelodeon characters, a water park with a heated pool and spa, a whole host of fun animal adventures, a massage and beauty salon and a state-of-the-art gym.

**Your Handpicked Inclusions – Unlimited theme park entry, daily kids’ breakfast and much, much more**

Plan adventurous days ahead with complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi included in your package. Before heading out for the day, kids (13 and under) eat a free buffet breakfast with every full paying adult at Shoreline Restaurant. Throughout your stay, receive one complimentary drink with every drink purchased from the Ultimate Menu (equal or lesser value with house wine, beer or cocktail).

You will enjoy unlimited theme park entry to Warner Bros. Movie World, Sea World, Wet'n'Wild Gold Cast and Paradise Country for the duration of your stay.

- **Warner Bros. Movie World:** Endless fun awaits at Warner Bros. Movie World, home to thrilling rides, world-class entertainment and some of your favourite characters and DC Super Heroes. Get spooked on the Scooby-Doo Spooky Coaster Next Generation, experience the Wild West Falls thrill ride and let the legendary DC Rivals HyperCoaster take your breath away.
- **Sea World:** Get below the surface and make friends with Sea World's amazing marine life, conveniently located just a short walk from the resort. From playful dolphins to cute penguins, entertaining seals and even sharks, you can get up close and personal with your favourite animals. Plus experience a world of incredible rides, shows and attractions.
- **Wet'n'Wild:** Splash into Wet’n’Wild, where summer is endless and so is the fun! Dive into a world of adventure and enjoy everything from adrenaline-pumping rides and slides to a massive children’s aquatic playground, a giant wave pool and more.
- **Paradise Country**: An authentic Australian farm experience for animal lovers awaits. Take a tractor ride, visit the horse arena, play with cute lambs in the paddock and don’t miss out on a meet-and-greet with Shaun the Sheep himself! Everyone will love the variety of activities, shows and experiences on offer.

The whole family will be spoilt for choice when it comes to the number of ways you to fill your day. Enjoy unlimited access to Nickelodeon SpongeBob SplashBash, and one complimentary child ‘Hop On, Hop Off’ day pass with the purchase of a Family Day Pass, getting around will be easy.

Your stay also includes a host of credits to use at various gift shops: A$20 Topgolf game credit, A$50 Animal Adventures credit, A$20 retail credit towards participating gift shops (Sea World, Warner Bros. Movie World, Wet’n’Wild and Paradise Country), A$20 credit towards selected Sea World Cruises and two A$10 credits to use at Sea World Resort Relaxation Corporation.

Make memories together and sample tasty cuisine at Hatsuhana Japanese Restaurant with a 15% dining discount or witness the incredible Australian Outback Spectacular's Heartland with 20% off tickets. The whole family can make the most of a 10% drinks and dining discount at Sea World, Warner Bros. Movie World, Wet’n’Wild and Paradise Country.

**Exclusive Travelshoot Upgrade:** Gone are the days of low-quality selfies, awkward poses and blurry images – this 30-minute professional photoshoot experience is a unique way to capture the natural, candid and heartwarming moments of your Gold Coast escape together as a family with Travelshoot. This experience is exclusive to Sea World guests and is the best way to celebrate your time together. In partnership with local photographers, together as a family, you can enjoy one 30-minute family photoshoot experience that has been designed to take in the scenic views of the Broadwater from within the resort, or select to have your memories captured at the beach.

Before the shoot, you will be connected with a network of local photographers who are passionate about creating natural candid family memories. On the day of your shoot, meet at your selected venue and the skilled photographer will comfortably guide you through the 30-minute session. Afterwards, samples will be provided within 48-hours, and you'll receive a full album of memories within 7 days through a link to a private online gallery where you can view, share and download your high-resolution photos.

reviews.content:
Thank you for a wonderful experience! Very friendly and accommodating staff. Nothing was too much hassle, beautiful clean rooms and very family friendly. All the restaurants onsite were amazing — 
 one of the best pizzas I have had. No reason to leave the resort.

Loved the resort — fantastic, friendly, helpful staff. Direct access to Sea World Park is a must for families and couples alike. The cocktail bar was a welcome stop after full days at theme parks. The breakfast buffet was lovely for both food and atmosphere.

Fantastic accommodation, great value and excellent service. Would thoroughly recommend going and enjoying a great weekend. The access to the park is so convenient. The variety of dining experiences ensure there is something for everyone.

description:
Venture to the edge of the world — perched atop the famous limestone cliffs of Bali’s southernmost peninsula known as Billionaire's Row — and experience the pinnacle of secluded luxury at Six Senses Uluwatu. Immerse yourself in sweeping views of the glittering Indian Ocean and watch as the sun dips below the horizon from the spectacular resort pool that clings to the cliff's edge over three terraced levels. As evening arrives, relax against the backdrop of the darkening sky with a delicious cocktail served at Cliff Bar.

This opulent eco-sanctuary – the island's only World Green Council-certified resort — combines its signature zero-waste concept with carefully curated contemporary touches, creating effortlessly elegant spaces you’ll never want to leave. Rejuvenate your body and soul with daily yoga and meditation, relax at the blissful wellness spa and indulge in gourmet farm-to-table sustainable dining at the resort’s two restaurants, including Japense fusion at the recently opened Watu Steakhouse. This is where luxury meets true tranquillity.
name: Clifftop Uluwatu Six Senses Paradise with Daily Breakfast, Two-Course Lunch or Dinner & Daily Two Hours Free Flow Drinks

copy.additionalDescription:
**Suite upgrades available:** Treat yourself to a truly luxurious experience on the tropical paradise of Uluwatu with a Cliff Pool Villa featuring a private plunge pool, stunning sundeck and one or two spacious bedrooms.

**Travelling with family?** Children under 5 stay and eat free, while children aged 6 to 11 stay free, with access the Kid's Club and a 50% discount on all additional food and drinks.

**Longer stay bonus:** Stay five nights or more and enjoy additional lunches or dinners at Rocka per adult. Stay seven nights or more and enjoy two 60-minute massages at Six Senses Spa per adult. See Packages for more details.

copy.finePrint:
Valid for travel from 1 May 2023 until 30 June 2024 (bookings must be made before 30 April 2024).

**Compulsory New Year's Gala Dinner:** For stays on 25 and 31 December, an additional surcharge of US$150 per adult (12+) and US$75 per child (6-11) applies for the compulsory Christmas and New Year's Eve gala dinners at Rocka Restaurant. Payable directly to the resort.

**Nyepi Day:** Please note the Nyepi Day of Silence will take place on 11 March 2024, during which airports are closed and check-in/checkout at the resort are unavailable.

**Blackout Dates Apply.** Dates are identified in the Booking Calendar.

**Surcharge:** A non-refundable surcharge per room, per night, applies for certain dates and is payable at the time of booking. Dates and prices are identified in the Booking Calendar.

Package Inclusions: Inclusions are correct at the time of purchase. Refer to your booking confirmation for details.

**Check Availability:** To confirm your dates of stay at purchase, click on 'Check Availability' and select your preferred package. Use the calendar to browse and select available dates. Dates with a surcharge are identified.

**Buy Now, Choose Dates Later:** If you want to secure this offer and don't know when you want to travel please select 'Buy Now, Choose Dates Later'. This will secure your package and give you the flexibility to choose your travel dates — within the book by and validity period and subject to availability. To select dates post purchase, simply select 'My Escapes' under the 'My Account' tab and follow the prompts.

**7-Day Change of Mind ‘No Questions Asked’ Refund Guarantee:** Things don’t always work out. Our 7-day Change of Mind Guarantee is there to help. Bookings (except for cruise bookings, flights and deposit fee, if applicable, which are subject to the cancellation terms of the relevant supplier) may be cancelled with a full refund provided that cancellation occurs strictly within 7 days from the date of purchase and provided that the cancellation is made no less than 14 days prior to the check-in date.

**Flexible Cancellation:** You can cancel your booking for credit up until **21** days prior to the original check-in date. This can be done via self-service in your ‘My Escapes’ account. Your credit will be valid for 12 months from the date of cancellation. Credits are not transferable and cannot be redeemed for cash.

Please note this does not apply to flights booked with us. Flight fulfilment is provided by the airline(s) selected at the time of finalising the booking. For your air travel, you are bound by the terms and conditions and fare rules of the selected airline(s).

**Date Changes:** If you need to amend your booking, you can self-service unlimited date changes in your ‘My Escapes’ account up until 21 days before your original check-in date. If you can't find a suitable date, or still need further assistance, please contact our 24/7 customer service team. Subject to availability and surcharges.

**Please Note:**

- Traditional Balinese massage provided at Six Senses Spa. Open from 9am to 9pm. Reservation in advance is required.
- Complimentary Cinema Under The Stars for all in-house guests includes a lounger, homemade popcorn and surround sound. Scheduled screenings take place three times a week from 7.30pm, but private experiences and screenings can also be arranged.
- Organic garden tour available every Friday, Saturday, Sunday from 4.30pm. One per package. Bookings required at least 24 hours in advance.
- Kids Club access is complimentary for guests over 5 years. Children under 5 years must be accompanied by parents at all times.

**Dining Fine Print:**

- Dining inclusions do not include drinks (unless otherwise stated). Menus are subject to change without notice.
- Dining closed for Nyepi Day 11 March 2024.
- Two-course lunch or dinner served at Rocka. Lunch from 12pm to 5pm, and dinner from 6pm to 11pm.
- Two-course dinner at Watu Steakhouse includes set menu dinner from 6pm to 11pm daily. Dinner at Watu Steakhouse is not valid for Christmas/New Year/any special events. Cannot be combined on the same day as choice of lunch or dinner at Rocka. There is no overlap of both inclusions being used on the same date. Advanced bookings essential.
- Daily breakfast is from 7.30am to 11am.
- Two-hour free-flow drinks at Cliff Bar is held from 3pm to 5pm, and includes drinks from the Six Senses Special Cocktail or Mocktail Menu.
- Daily unlimited ice cream complimentary for all in-house guests from 12pm to 4pm.
- Children aged 4 and under stay and eat free. Children aged 5 — 11 stay free and receive a 50% discount on all additional food and beverage.

**Airport Transfers**

**Inclusions:**

- One-way deluxe airport transfer
- English speaking driver
- Airport parking fee and toll fee
- One bottle of 330ml water per person

**Fine Print:**

- You will be emailed an online form to book in your date and time within 1-2 days of purchase. Keep an eye out for an email from luxuryescapes@icstravelapi.com.
- Suitable for three guests or two adults and two children
- Infant seat can be pre booked at US$3 per seat each way. Guest can bring their own.
- Three-passenger car can fit three pieces of luggage.
- Driver will wait for a delay of up to one hour. After that, the transfer will be considered cancelled.

**Important:** The hotel, transportation and/or destination you are travelling to may have health, insurance and vaccination requirements in place. Please ensure you stay up to date with any requirements prior to your departure.

The property, facilities and dining are subject to government regulations and restrictions. Please check the property website for the most up-to-date information as some of the services may be impacted.

We reserve the right to modify prices for marketing and commercial reasons. Please note that full terms and conditions apply. Refer to the website's terms and conditions.

*Images are for illustrative purposes and may not be reflective of the package purchased. See individual offers and packages for details.
copy.gettingThere:
Overlooking the striking Indian Ocean and nearby Bali’s famed Uluwatu Temple, Six Senses Uluwatu is located on a glorious cliff face on the southwestern tip of the Bukit Peninsula of Bali. With a plenty of beaches, a rich culture of food, music and artisan goods in close proximity and the immense Caldera Volcano Batur just a short distance away, entertainment is never far on the island.

The resort is located approximately a 35-minute drive from Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS). One-way airport transfers are included in select packages only, please see Fine Print for more details.

**Need flights?** Our dedicated flights concierge can assist with your flight requirements (subject to availability). Contact [sales@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:sales@luxuryescapes.com).

property.name: Six Senses Uluwatu
property.address: Jalan Goa Lempeh, Uluwatu, Kec. Kuta Sel., Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361, Indonesia

reviews.content: Why can we give only five stars? This hotel deserves more! Every photo you take here is beautiful. The endless pool is a dream, so huge! The sunset every day is one of the highlights! The staff is more than friendly and very helpful. The rooms are spacious — we even had our own pool. So nice to swim under the stars! Tip: Sunday brunch, just wow! This hotel is epic!

We took the Sky Suite which had unblocked views of the sea and skyline, though the distance to the ocean was quite far. Room was spacious, comfortable with a massive balcony.

The massive infinity pool and bar next to it with panoramic views of the ocean is a complete delight. Stunning backdrop for perfect pictures.

Top-notch service was a key highlight. Throughout our stay ... [the] service staff were extremely attentive, helpful, friendly and even went out of their way to surprise us with a specialty-made cocktail and thank you note on our last day.

We had an unbelievable stay here on our honeymoon. Talk about a hotel that really takes being a five-star resort incredibly seriously. From the second we arrived in the stunning lobby, we knew this was such a special place — incredible ocean views everywhere, stunning landscaping, beautifully designed rooms and facilities — everything was truly top-notch. [We stayed in] a One Bedroom Villa, which was ridiculously stunning and had a private pool with an incredible view. The service, from the reception to the room to the pool and restaurant, was just perfect. The room cleaners came every time we left the room, but never bothered us when we were there — no idea how they pulled that off.

The breakfast buffet was maybe the best I've ever seen, which is saying a lot. Overall, you couldn't ask for a more perfect luxury experience, and it is 100% worth the slight splurge especially for a special occasion.

Six Senses is by far the best among the numerous five-star properties in Bali we have stayed in.

name: Five-Star Fiji Coral Coast Oasis with Four Restaurants

copy.additionalDescription: **Travelling with Family?** Make memories together and select the Superior Garden View for up to two adults and three children (12 and under).
copy.description: Surround yourself with the unsurpassed beauty of Fiji’s Coral Coast, where glistening waters, towering palm trees and white sandy beaches provide the perfect setting for an unforgettable escape at the five-star Warwick Fiji. Splash about in the family pool or relax in the adults-only corner, and feel the warm tropical breeze wash over you. Unwind and experience ultimate relaxation at Warwick Fiji’s superior spa – perched on the edge of the ocean overlooking a serene lagoon. Onsite restaurants include the famed Wicked Walu, Japanese restaurant Sazanami, Italian eatery Pappagallo and the buffet-style Bula Brasserie. The Kids’ Club will delight little ones with sandcastle building and treasure hunting, while kayaking, snorkelling, and stand-up paddleboarding is available to the older kids.

Package Inclusions: Inclusions are correct at the time of purchase. Refer to your booking confirmation for details. Please note package inclusions for extra guests vary depending on the rate selected, please choose your package carefully.

Dining inclusions do not include beverages (unless otherwise stated). Menus are subject to change without notice.

**Please Note:**

- **Resort Credit:** The included FJD105 resort credit must be used during your stay. Any unused credit will be forfeited and is not transferable or redeemable for cash.

**Important:** The hotel, transportation and/or destination you are travelling to may have health, insurance and vaccination requirements in place. Please ensure you stay up to date with any requirements prior to your departure.

The property, facilities and dining are subject to government regulations and restrictions. Please check the property website for the most up-to-date information as some of the services may be impacted.

Luxury Escapes reserves the right to modify prices for marketing and commercial reasons. Please note that full [terms and conditions apply](https://luxuryescapes.com/terms-and-conditions).
copy.gettingThere:
Perfectly positioned on Fiji's famed Coral Coast, Warwick Fiji offers the ultimate in relaxation and idyllic island atmosphere. The resort is located just shot of a two-hour drive from Nadi International Airport (NAN). Airport transfers are not included in your package, please plan accordingly.

**Need flights?** Our dedicated flights concierge can assist with all your flight requirements. Contact [sales@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:sales@luxuryescapes.com).

name: Five-Star Kempinski Luxury in the Heart of Singapore with Saltwater Relaxation Pool

copy.additionalDescription: **Tripadvisor** **Travellers’ Choice, Best of the Best 2022** Top 25 Hotels – Singapore
copy.description: Experience unrivalled luxury at The Capitol Kempinski Hotel Singapore, a five-star property that exudes the charm and character of a luxurious colonial building while offering guests every modern convenience. This cosmopolitan retreat is perfectly positioned to explore Singapore's famed sites, including Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park and the National Museum of Singapore. Spend your days eating, drinking, shopping and exploring, before returning to your elegant accommodation. Head to the hotel's saltwater relaxation pool to soak away your stress or work up a sweat in the onsite fitness centre. Pop over to the mouthwatering 15 Stamford by Alvin Leung for tasty bites from the restaurant’s hot coal grill or visit one of the four eateries at Arcade @ The Capitol Kempinski for delicious international cuisine.
copy.facilities:
- 15 Stamford by Alvin Leung restaurant
- The Bar at 15 Stamford
- Berthold Delikatessen
- Frieda restaurant
- Broadway American Diner
- La Scala Ristorante
- Lobby Lounge
- Outdoor saltwater relaxation pool
- Luxury spa
- 24/7 fitness centre
- Concierge and Lady in Red service
- Complimentary self-parking (one vehicle per package)
- Wi-Fi
- Check-in: 3pm / Checkout: 12pm

Surcharges may apply to select facilities and services
copy.finePrint:
Package Inclusions: Inclusions are correct at the time of purchase. Refer to your booking confirmation for details. Please note package inclusions for extra guests vary depending on the rate selected, please choose your package carefully.

Dining inclusions do not include drinks (unless otherwise stated). Menus are subject to change without notice.

**Please Note:**

- Promotional Rate credit is for use at 15 Stamford by Alvin Leung and The Bar at 15 Stamford. Credit is non-accumulative and must be used during your stay. Any unused credit will be forfeited and is not transferable or redeemable for cash.

**Important:** The hotel, transportation and/or destination you are travelling to may have health, insurance and vaccination requirements in place. Please ensure you stay up to date with any requirements prior to your departure.

The property, facilities and dining are subject to government regulations and restrictions. Please check the property website for the most up-to-date information as some of the services may be impacted.

Luxury Escapes reserves the right to modify prices for marketing and commercial reasons. Please note that full [terms and conditions apply](https://luxuryescapes.com/terms-and-conditions).
copy.gettingThere:
Make the most of this glamorous hotel’s privileged location in the heart of Singapore’s civic and cultural district. Raffles City Singapore, a sprawling shopping centre filled with international and local fashion brands, as well as international dining options, is just a five-minute walk away. From here, you’ll be able to visit iconic landmarks like the Parliament of Singapore, Marina Bay Sands and distinguished museums like Singapore Art Museum and National Gallery Singapore. Singapore Changi Airport (SIN) is approximately a 20-minute drive from the hotel. Airport transfers are not included in your package, please plan accordingly.

**Need flights?** Our dedicated flights concierge can assist with all your flight requirements. Contact [sales@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:sales@luxuryescapes.com).

name: Australia & New Zealand: Disney Cruise Line with Imaginative Dining, Disney Favourites & Magical Entertainment

copy.additionalDescription:
**Secure your spot with Disney Magic at Sea:** While our two-night sailings are currently sold out, three- to six-night sailings are still available. Book today to experience the  fantastical worlds only Disney could create.

**Need assistance finding the perfect cruise departure (and suite) for you?** Contact our dedicated customer service team: 1300 438 140 for Australia or 0800 648 383 for New Zealand members.
copy.description:
For the first time, Disney Cruise Line is coming to Australia and New Zealand. Disney Magic at Sea brings enchantment and cherished Disney friends to your shores for two- to six-night limited-time sailings starting October 2023. Immerse yourself in the magic of Disney storytelling with favourite characters, imaginative dining, spectacular entertainment and themed events throughout your sailing.

Meet friends from Disney, Pixar, Marvel and Star Wars. Assemble and watch as some favourite heroes save the day at Marvel Heroes Unite. Meet Princess Tiana herself at Tiana’s Place, and taste New Orleans cuisine to the sound of live jazz music. Or, celebrate Disney animation at Animator’s Palate — an innovative show where your surroundings awaken with colour and characters. Watch as favourite Disney stories come to life in Broadway-style shows at the Walt Disney Theatre, including Frozen: A Musical Spectacular. Adults even have their own exclusive spaces to rest and relax, including an adults-only pool area, elegant, sophisticated dining and the rejuvenating Senses Spa.
copy.facilities:
**Dining**

- Animator’s Palate
- Triton’s
- Tiana’s Place
- Daisy's de-Lites
- Palo (adults only)
- Pinocchio's Pizza

**Bars, Lounges & Nightclubs**

- Azure
- Cadillac Lounge
- Crown & Fin Pub

**Youth Areas**

- Disney’s Oceaneer Club (Andy’s Room, MARVEL Superhero Academy, Disney Junior, Frozen Adventures)
- Disney’s Oceaneer Lab
- Edge (Tween Club)
- Vibe (Teen Club)
- Bibbidi Bobbidi Boutique

**Entertainment**

- Goofy’s Pool
- Quiet Cove Pool (adults only)
- AquaLab
- Senses Spa & Salon
- Fitness centre

Surcharges may apply to select facilities and services
copy.finePrint:
**Booking Summary:** Purchasing this deal does not complete your booking. A booking form will be emailed to you after purchase. Please complete the Traveller’s Details within 48 hours.

**IMPORTANT**: Failure to complete your booking form may result in forfeiting your booking. Once your booking form has been finalised a member of the Luxury Escapes Cruise Team will process your booking and email the cruise line confirmation to your chosen email address. You will then be required to complete your online check-in and print your e-ticket and baggage tags; you will also be able to add beverage packages, speciality dining, shore excursions, spa treatments, etc.

**This Cruise package is valid for the following departure dates:**

**Sydney departures:**

- 28 October 2023 (4 Nights)
- 24 December 2023 (4 Nights)
- 28 December 2023 (6 Nights) – includes an international stop in Nouméa, New Caledonia
- 5 January 2024 (3 Nights)
- 8 January 2024 (4 Nights)
- 14 January 2024 (6 Nights) – includes an international stop in Nouméa, New Caledonia
- 20 January 2024 (3 Nights)
- 23 January 2024 (3 Nights)

**Melbourne departures:**

- 3 November 2023 (2 Nights)
- 5 November 2023 (4 Nights)
- 16 November 2023 (5 Nights) – ends in Auckland, New Zealand
- 26 January 2024 (4 Nights)

**Brisbane departures:**

- 11 December 2023 (4 Nights)
- 20 December 2023 (2 Nights)
- 22 December 2023 (2 Nights)

**Auckland departures:**

- 28 November 2023 (3 Nights)
- 4 December 2023 (4 Nights) – ends in Brisbane, Australia

**IMPORTANT:** Please allow for travelling time. International flights are not included in your package and must be purchased separately. It is your responsibility to make your own travel arrangements and ensure that you arrive at your departure port on time for your cruise.

**Booking Process**

- Select which package option you would like, taking care to choose the correct cabin option
- Click on the green ‘Check Availability tab
- Using the plus or minus adjust the number of people you would like to book then click the ‘View Available Dates & Prices’ tab
- Click the blue ‘Select’ button then the green ‘Review & Payment’ tab at the bottom right of the screen
- Fill out your preferred payment method and click the green ‘Pay Securely Now’ tab
- Once your order is complete, you will receive your Luxury Escapes automated booking summary email (this is not your cruise confirmation), and you will be prompted to complete your Traveller Details within 48 hours of purchase
- Once your traveller forms are completed they will be sent to the Luxury Escapes Cruise Concierge team, who will then contact you to advise if your cruise is confirmed
- Should you require assistance with your cruise, please contact our Cruise Concierge team at [cruises@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:cruises@luxuryescapes.com) who will be happy to assist with any of your queries and who will support you right up until you return from your journey

**IMPORTANT:** The Twin-Room Package is valid for TWO PEOPLE (based on twin room).

**AMENDMENTS & CHANGES**

**Name Change or Corrections**

- Name corrections may incur a fee.
- Name changes are not permitted.

**48-Hour Change of Mind ‘No Questions Asked’ Refund Guarantee:**

- All cruise bookings have a 48-hour ‘Change of Mind Guarantee’ where any monies paid (less unrecoverable costs) within 48 hours of the initial purchase date will be refunded – no questions asked.
- Bookings outside the 48-hour ‘Change of Mind’ window will be non-refundable.

**Cabin Sizes and Bedding Configuration**

This cruise includes the following cabin types:

- Standard Inside Stateroom 17sqm with one queen bed, a single sofa bed and an upper berth pull-down bed.
- Deluxe Oceanview Stateroom: 19sqm with one queen bed, a single sofa bed and an upper berth pull-down bed.
- Deluxe Oceanview Stateroom with Verandah: 24sqm with one queen bed, a single sofa bed and an upper berth pull-down bed.

IMPORTANT:

- Cabins are on a ‘guarantee’ basis and will be allocated by the cruise line closer to sailing. Specific cabin, deck and location requests cannot be accommodated.
- Some cabins may have obstructed views and/or porthole window.
- Maximum room capacity is one adult for solo travellers, two adults for twin-share cabins/suites/staterooms or four people for quad-share cabins.
- Wheelchair-accessible staterooms are available on request and subject to availability. Surcharges may apply.

**Inclusions**

- Disney cruise in your selected stateroom
- Daily all-inclusive meals onboard, with breakfast, lunch, dinner and snacks in select restaurants and 24-hour room service
- Complimentary onboard entertainment, activities and stage performances
- Unlimited coffee, tea and soft drinks onboard

**Exclusions**

- Roundtrip flights
- Visas
- Single supplement
- Meals/drinks not stated in the itinerary/inclusions
- Speciality dining
- Shore excursions
- Travel insurance (recommended)
- Gratuities are NOT included and will be added to your final bill (approx. US$14.50 per person, per day)
- Dining inclusions do not include drinks (unless otherwise stated). Menus are subject to change without notice.
- Royal Court Royal Tea, a tea party with Disney Characters for kids ages 3 to 12
- Bibbidi Bobbidi Boutique and The Pirate’s League, offering magical makeovers for children
- Wi-Fi
- Transfers to and from cruise ship
- City taxes or resort fees may apply and are payable directly to the hotel on arrival

**Onboard Dining**

- Dining times onboard can vary between sailings. We ask for your preference, however, your preferred dining time may not be available. We suggest that you speak with the maître d' once onboard.
- Included dining is available at the following restaurants: Animator's Palate, Triton's and Tiana's Place.

**Age Restrictions**

- Children under the age of 18 must be accompanied, in the same or connecting cabin, by a parent or other responsible adult over the age of 21 for the duration of the voyage.
- Guests aged 13+ are considered adults.
- Guests must be 18+ to consume alcohol.
- Infants under 6 months cannot be accommodated onboard.

**Travel Insurance**

- Travel insurance is strongly recommended. Luxury Escapes
- recommends purchasing travel insurance as soon as possible after purchasing this package.

**Passports & Visas**

- A valid passport or government-issued photo identification is required for all passengers. A current Medicare card can be used for guests under 18 years of age and must be presented upon embarkation.
- When travelling within Australia, please check current [state/territory border entry requirements](https://www.health.gov.au/news/health-alerts/novel-coronavirus-2019-ncov-health-alert/coronavirus-covid-19-restrictions/coronavirus-covid-19-domestic-travel-restrictions-and-remote-area-access#state-and-territory-travel-restrictions) to ensure you're eligible to travel and have completed any required permits or passes.
- A visa may be required. It is the traveller’s responsibility to ensure they’re holding a current visa for the countries they’re visiting. If the traveller is on a non-Australian passport, a valid re-entry visa may be required.
- **Important**: Please start arranging your visa at least 6-8 weeks prior to departure to account for any delays due to consulate operating hours and processing time.
- A valid passport with a minimum validity of 6 months beyond your return travel date is required for all passengers (including children and infants).

**Photo ID**

- For all cruises, a copy of government-issued photo identification (passport or driver’s license) is required to embark.
- Children without ID must present an original birth certificate at embarkation. Copies will not be accepted.
- Failure to provide a valid photo ID as required by the cruise Operator may result in your booking being cancelled and all monies are non-refundable.

**Health & Vaccinations**

- Travellers are advised to check recommended vaccinations with their local health professional at least 45 days prior to departure, as some vaccinations require 30 days or more to be effective.
- Proof of vaccination is not usually required unless you are coming from an infected area.
- Proof of Yellow Fever vaccinations is required for entry into some countries, in particular in Africa. Please check with your health professional that you hold the appropriate vaccination entry requirements for your destination.
- Guests may be required to provide evidence of proof of vaccination against COVID-19 from our ground operator prior to embarkation. Please contact the Luxury Escapes Cruises Concierge team on [cruises@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:cruiseteam@luxuryescapes.com) for further information.
- **Important:** The hotel, transportation and/or destination you are travelling to may have health, insurance and vaccination requirements in place. Please ensure you stay up to date with any requirements prior to your departure.

**Currency Onboard and Tipping**

- The currency onboard is US$.
- Tipping and gratuities are not included in the package unless otherwise stated, and are at your own discretion. As a guide, approx. US$10 – US$15 per person, per day, is the industry standard.

**Fitness Requirements**

- Travellers should have a good level of physical fitness and mobility and must be able to negotiate uneven surfaces and climb stairs.
- Disability access is limited during the cruise, please consider this when making your booking.
- Travellers acknowledge that they are required to have a good level of health and fitness to undertake any activities in this package. Further, travellers acknowledge and agree that neither Luxury Escapes nor the third-party provider will be able to provide medical or other assistance in the event that they are unable to complete any aspect of the tour as a result of their health or physical condition (nor is Luxury Escapes liable for any loss, damage, expense, injury or death arising from such).

**Surcharges**

Any prices quoted exclude specific costs/measures which may be introduced at a later stage as a result of Government changes due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions. Our trusted third-party suppliers will inform guests of these changes as soon as possible.

**COVID-19 Safe Plan**

The cruise line's COVID-19 policy can be accessed [here](https://disneycruise.disney.go.com/why-cruise-disney/experience-updates/us/).

**Deposits**

The deposit amount is 25% and the final payment date is due 190 prior to embarkation. Please note: other deposit options may be available on your package which differ from the above and which will be outlined in the ‘fine print’ and payment section of the specific package.

**PLEASE NOTE:**

Cots, pull-down beds, dining times and shore excursions can be requested on the Navigator App after booking.

Luxury Escapes reserves the right to modify prices for marketing and commercial reasons. Please note that full terms and conditions apply. Refer to the website's terms and conditions.

Cruise itineraries are not guaranteed and are subject to change. While the cruise line will make all reasonable efforts to provide a cruise in accordance with the published schedules and itineraries, factors such as weather, mechanical difficulties or other unforeseen circumstances may affect scheduled itineraries.

Package inclusions are correct at the time of purchase. Refer to your booking summary email for details.

Please note this cruise is operated by Disney Cruise Line, one of our trusted partners. You will be contacted post-purchase with further details.
copy.gettingThere:
Your cruise departs from Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane or Auckland. 

Roundtrip flights are not included in your package and must be purchased separately. **Please do NOT book your flights until your cruise is confirmed.**  

When travelling within Australia, please check current [state/territory border entry requirements](https://www.health.gov.au/news/health-alerts/novel-coronavirus-2019-ncov-health-alert/coronavirus-covid-19-restrictions/coronavirus-covid-19-domestic-travel-restrictions-and-remote-area-access#state-and-territory-travel-restrictions) to ensure you're eligible to travel and have completed any required permits or passes. 

A visa may be required for the destination you are visiting. It is each traveller's responsibility to ensure they are holding a current visa. Please take the time to visit our preferred vendor website [Visas Direct](https://visasdirect.com.au/) to assist you with any visa application requirements and processes. If you require any supporting documentation when applying for your visa please let us know and we would be more than happy to assist. Click [here](https://visasdirect.com.au/?login=luxescapes) to visit the website.  

**Need flights?** Australian customers can now [purchase flights](https://luxuryescapes.com/flights) with or without accommodation packages. We are working hard to launch this functionality in other markets. For now, our dedicated flights concierge can assist with all your flight requirements. Contact [sales@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:sales@luxuryescapes.com).
copy.highlights:
**Disney Cruise Line – Where wonders never cease**

Imagine a place where families can reconnect, adults can recharge and kids can immerse themselves in fantastical worlds only Disney could create. Renowned for its classic design, modern innovation and timeless whimsy, the Disney Cruise Line is home to 11 decks overflowing with restaurants, pools, recreation and more — ready to transport you to exotic locales waiting to be explored. Be immersed in a seemingly endless stream of one-of-a-kind offerings to inspire and delight the entire family, where Disney’s world-renowned quality and service are matched only by the magic that can be found around every corner.

Enjoy Broadway-style musicals, see your favorite Disney characters in new and exciting ways. Plus, imaginative kids clubs, adult-exclusive hotspots and three themed swimming pools ensure that everywhere you turn, there’s something fun for everyone.

**The Staterooms – Magic at all corners of the ship**

Designed with families in mind, Disney Cruise Line staterooms aboard the Disney Cruise Line are equipped with innovations that ensure the ultimate in comfort and relaxation for guests of all ages. From an imaginative inside retreat to a spacious and abundantly appointed suite, our world-class accommodations let you and your loved ones travel the high seas in high style.

If you want to know more about the Disney Cruise Line, read more on [Dream with Luxury Escapes.](https://dream.luxuryescapes.com/what-to-expect-disney-cruise-line-is-coming-to-australia-for-the-first-time-ever/)

subjectLine: AU & NZ: Famous Disney Cruise w. All Meals & Magical Entertainment
preheader: For the first time, Disney Cruise Line is coming to Australia and New Zealand. Disney Magic at Sea brings enchantment and cherished Disney friends to your shores for 2- 6 night limited-time sailings

name: Hong Kong to Singapore: 14-Night Luxury Cruise with All Onboard Meals, Pre-Cruise Stay & Specialty Dining Experience

copy.additionalDescription:
**Your journey takes you to: Hong Kong – Manila, Philippines – Puerto Princesa, Philippines – Kota Kinabalu, Sabahlaem, Malaysia – Phu My (Ho Chi Minh City), Vietnam – Laem Chabang (Bangkok), Thailand – Singapore.**

**Upgrades available:** Make your voyage extra special by upgrading to a Verandah Stateroom and enjoy US$100 onboard credit per person, or elevate the indulgence in a Signature Suite and enjoy A$150 onboard credit per person.
copy.description:
Embark on a spellbinding adventure across Southeast Asia on a 14-night luxury cruise onboard Holland America Line's spectacular MS Westerdam. Your voyage begins in Hong Kong, where you'll enjoy a pre-cruise stay at the cosmopolitan The Harbourview Hong Kong before setting sail towards the sun-soaked shores of the Philippines and getting a taste of Malay culture and Islamic art in Kota Kinabalu. Sample the flavours of Vietnam's Ho Chi Minh City and marvel at the bustling energy of Bangkok before disembarking in the eclectic city-state of Singapore.

Indulge in a grandiose experience onboard MS Westerdam, an elegant mid-sized ship that offers decadent dining options, modern staterooms and luxe amenities. You'll be treated to onboard dining at select restaurants, world-class entertainment including a BBC Earth at Sea shows, five-star fitness and spa facilities and one speciality dining experience for two at Pinnacle Grill, the ultimate steakhouse at sea.
copy.facilities:
**Dining & Bars**

- 24-hour room service
- The Dining Room
- Lido Market
- Dive-In
- Pinnacle Grill (speciality restaurant, steak and seafood)
- Canaletto (speciality restaurant, Italian)
- Explorations Café (speciality restaurant, cafe and cocktails)
- Crows Nest Bar

**Entertainment**

- Onboard entertainment including BBC Earth in concert
- Explorations Central
- B.B Kings Blues Club & Americas Test Kitchen
- World Stage
- Billboard on Board
- Lincoln Center Stage
- Live entertainment including theatre-style shows
- Kids' Club (ages 3-17)
- Boutique shopping
- Casino
- Art Gallery
- Wi-Fi

**Fitness & Wellness**

- Two swimming pools
- Greenhouse Spa & Salon
- Sun deck
- Jogging track
- Fitness centre
- Deck sports
- Sports court

Surcharges apply to select services and facilities
copy.finePrint:
**Booking Summary:** Purchasing this deal does not complete your booking. A booking form will be emailed to you after purchase. Please complete the Traveller’s Details within 48 hours.

**IMPORTANT:** Failure to complete your booking form may result in forfeiting your booking. Once your booking form has been finalised a member of the Luxury Escapes Cruise Team will process your booking and email the cruise line confirmation to your chosen email address. You will then be required to complete your online check-in and print your e-ticket and baggage tags; you will also be able to add beverage packages, specialty dining, shore excursions, spa treatments, etc.

**This Cruise package is valid for the following departure dates:**

- 10 November 2023 (cruise boards 11 November 2023)

**IMPORTANT:** Please allow for travelling time. International flights are not included in your package and must be purchased separately. It is your responsibility to make your own travel arrangements and ensure that you arrive in Hong Kong on time for your cruise.

**Booking Process**

- Select which package option you would like, taking care to choose the correct cabin option
- Click on the green ‘Check Availability’ tab
- Using the plus or minus adjust the number of people you would like to book then click the ‘View Available Dates & Prices’ tab
- Click the blue ‘Select’ button then the green ‘Review & Payment’ tab at the bottom right of the screen
- Fill out your preferred payment method and click the green ‘Pay Securely Now’ tab
- Once your order is complete, you will receive your Luxury Escapes automated booking summary email (this is not your cruise confirmation), and you will be prompted to complete your Traveller Details within 48 hours of purchase
- Once your traveller forms are completed they will be sent to the Luxury Escapes Cruise Concierge team, who will then contact you to advise if your cruise is confirmed
- Should you require assistance with your cruise, please contact our Cruise Concierge team at [cruises@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:cruises@luxuryescapes.com) who will be happy to assist with any of your queries and who will support you right up until you return from your journey

**IMPORTANT:** The Twin-Room Package is valid for ONE PERSON (based on twin room). You must purchase TWO PACKAGES.

**Solo Traveller Surcharge:** Solo travellers must pay a surcharge and packages are subject to availability. Please contact Luxury Escapes to enquire.

Please note that packages cannot be split.

**AMENDMENTS & CHANGES**

**Name Change or Corrections**

- Name corrections may incur a fee.
- Name changes are not permitted.

**48-Hour Change of Mind ‘No Questions Asked’ Refund Guarantee:**

- All cruise bookings have a 48-hour ‘Change of Mind Guarantee’ where any monies paid (less unrecoverable costs) within 48 hours of the initial purchase date will be refunded – no questions asked.
- Bookings outside the 48-hour ‘Change of Mind’ window will be non-refundable **and non-changeable.**

**Cabin Sizes and Bedding Configuration**

This cruise includes the following cabin types:

- Inside Stateroom (15sqm) – queen bed or split twin beds, no view
- Oceanview Stateroom (15sqm) – queen bed or split twin beds, picture window
- Verandah Stateroom (19sqm) – queen bed or split twin beds, balcony
- Signature Suite (34 sqm) – queen bed or split twin beds, balcony

**Pre-Cruise Accommodation:**

- Hong Kong— The Harbourview Hong Kong or similar (Double Harbour View Room)

**IMPORTANT:**

- Cabins are on a ‘guarantee’ basis and will be allocated by the cruise line closer to sailing. Specific cabin, deck and location requests cannot be accommodated.
- Some cabins may have obstructed views and/or porthole window.
- Maximum room capacity is one adult for solo travellers, two adults for twin-share cabins/suites/staterooms or four people for quad-share cabins.
- Wheelchair accessible cabins are not available. They are on application only prior to purchase. Surcharges may apply. 
- Please contact the Luxury Escapes sales team on [sales@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:sales@luxuryescapes.com) for further information.

**Inclusions**

- 14-night cruise onboard Holland America's MS Westerdam
- One night of pre-cruise accommodation at The Harbourview Hong Kong (or similar) with breakfast
- Daily breakfast, lunch and dinner while onboard
- One dining experience for two at speciality restaurant, Pinnacle Grill
- US$100 onboard credit for Verandah Stateroom; US$150 onboard credit for Signature Suite
- All port taxes, service charges and onboard entertainment

**Exclusions**

- Roundtrip flights
- Visas
- Single supplement
- Meals/drinks not stated in the itinerary/inclusions
- Specialty dining
- Shore excursions
- Travel insurance (recommended)
- Gratuities are NOT included and will be added to your final bill
- Dining inclusions do not include drinks (unless otherwise stated). Menus are subject to change without notice.
- Transfers to and from cruise ship
- City taxes or resort fees may apply and are payable directly to the hotel on arrival

**Onboard Dining**

- Dining times onboard can vary between sailings. We ask for your preference, however, your preferred dining time may not be available. We suggest that you speak with the maître d' once onboard.
- Fees apply for drinks at all bars and restaurants
- Speciality dining is based on cruise duration and ship type. Guests will receive one night at Pinnacle Grill. Please note if Pinnacle Grill is unavailable, guests will be able to dine one night at Canaletto. Offer excludes Specialty Dining Events in the Pinnacle Grill such as Sel De Mer, De Librije and Sommelier Dinner. Reservations and dining times will be available to pre-reserve.
- Included dining is available at the following restaurants: The Dining Room, Lido Market, Dive-In, and in-room dining.

**Age Restrictions**

- Children under the age of 18 must be accompanied, in the same or connecting cabin, by a parent or other responsible adult over the age of 18 for the duration of the voyage.
- Infants under 12 months cannot be accommodated onboard.

**Travel Insurance**

Travel insurance is strongly recommended. Luxury Escapes recommends purchasing travel insurance as soon as possible after purchasing this package.

**Passports & Visas**

- A visa may be required. It is the traveller’s responsibility to ensure they’re holding a current visa for the countries they’re visiting. If the traveller is on a non-Australian passport, a valid re-entry visa may be required.
- **Important:** Please start arranging your visa at least 6-8 weeks prior to departure to account for any delays due to consulate operating hours and processing time.
- A valid passport with a minimum validity of 6 months beyond your return travel date is required for all passengers (including children and infants).

**Health & Vaccinations**

- Travellers are advised to check recommended vaccinations with their local health professional at least 45 days prior to departure, as some vaccinations require 30 days or more to be effective.
- Proof of vaccination is not usually required unless you are coming from an infected area.
- Proof of Yellow Fever vaccinations is required for entry into some countries, in particular in Africa. Please check with your health professional that you hold the appropriate vaccination entry requirements for your destination.
- Guests may be required to provide evidence of proof of vaccination against COVID-19 from our ground operator prior to embarkation. Please contact the Luxury Escapes Cruises Concierge team on [cruises@luxuryescapes.com](mailto:cruiseteam@luxuryescapes.com) for further information.
- **Important:** The hotel, transportation and/or destination you are travelling to may have health, insurance and vaccination requirements in place. Please ensure you stay up to date with any requirements prior to your departure.

**Currency Onboard and Tipping**

- The currency onboard is US$.
- Tipping and gratuities are not included in the package, and are at your own discretion. As a guide, approx. US$10 – US$15 per person, per day, is the industry standard.

**Fitness Requirements**

- Travellers should have a good level of physical fitness and mobility and must be able to negotiate uneven surfaces and climb stairs.
- Disability access is limited during the cruise, please consider this when making your booking.
- Travellers acknowledge that they are required to have a good level of health and fitness to undertake any activities in this package. tour.name: Hong Kong to Singapore: 14-Night Luxury Holland America Cruise w. Pre-Cruise Stay
tour.itinerary:
**Day 1: Arrive in Hong Kong**

Welcome to Hong Kong! With its spectacular, serrated skyline of soaring towers and neon lights, Hong Kong is a vibrant, immersive metropolis and cultural hub. A city where future and tradition collide – perhaps best illustrated by the skyscrapers that feature gaping holes, designed to allow spirit dragons to soar from the hills to the waterfront unimpeded. Hong Kong's dense jumble of activity is one of its main appeals, yet it's surprisingly easy to find peace among the intense urban wonders.

Dramatic harbourfront light shows transform the waterfront’s gleaming buildings into a colourful canvas, and you'll be able to witness it all from your luxurious pre-cruise stay at the Harbourview Hong Kong  (or similar). Enter a world of high-end luxury, modern design and charm, superbly situated in the heart of the city, just steps from Victoria Harbour.

**Accommodation:** The Harbourview Hong Kong

**Days 2–3: Hong Kong**

After your included breakfast, make the most of your morning in Hong Kong. Wander flowing shopping streets, wade through sprawling markets and soak up the neon glory of this one-of-a-kind city. Make your own way to the ship in the afternoon of Day 2, where you will dock overnight, allowing you plenty of time to explore one of the most energetic cities in the world. 

On Day 3, spend your morning touring the historic alleyways and culturally-significant temples, take in the picturesque skyline from Victoria Peak, or take to the water and explore the harbour on a traditional junk boat. As you make your way through the city, you’ll find plenty of opportunities to shop, sample delicious Cantonese dishes or people-watch. Be sure to return to the ship in plenty of time for your departure in the afternoon.

**Meals:** Breakfast & Dinner (Day 2), Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner (Day 3)

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 4: At Sea**

Settle into the phenomenal MS Westerdam today and take advantage of the onboard activities and delectable cuisine. Familiarise yourself with your favourite eateries and make the most of the onboard shows.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 5: Manila, Philippines**

As you dock in Manila, prepare to lose yourself in the intoxicating urban energy of this Spanish-influenced city. There are endless wonders to be discovered in this melting pot of culture and creativity. Visit the elegant Malacanang Palace, the National Museum of the Philippines and Rizal Park, before paying your respects at the American Cemetery and Memorial at Fort Santiago, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Spend your afternoon strolling the palm-lined Manila Baywalk to catch a legendary sunset, and savour delicious street food.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 6: At Sea**

Explore the natural world with BBC Earth in Concert or spoil yourself with a massage (charges apply) at the Greenhouse Spa & Salon. Stay on top of your fitness with a workout class at the fully equipped gym, or try your luck at the onboard casino. Music aficionados will love the Billboard Onboard, where you can enjoy the very best in live music or your favourite anthems, while kids can unleash their competitive spirit in Club HAL, complete with arts and crafts, sports, video game competitions, scavenger hunts, challenging team games and themed parties.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 7: Puerto Princesa, Phiippines**

Today you will sail into Puerto Princesa, the Philippines' greenest and cleanest city. This stunning coastal city is dotted with UNESCO World Heritage sites, including the awe-inspiring Subterranean River, and is popular with tourists and locals alike for its captivating natural landscapes and storied history. Visit the World War II historical sites and museums, learn about the city's dedication to environmental conservation, or explore the budding restaurant scene.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 8: At Sea**

Make the most of MS Westerdam's incredible facilities with a full day at sea.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 9: Kota Kinabalu, Sabahlaem, Malaysia**

Welcome to Malaysia. Today you will glide into the diverse city of Kota Kinabalu. Marvel at the spectacular gold-domed mosque, distinctive high-rise architecture, and Heritage Village. Choose to spend your day lazing on the golden shores of one of the spectacular beaches or explore the fragrant Kinabalu Park, where exotic plants and rare orchids flourish.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 10: At Sea**

Enjoy delicious culinary experiences at The Dining Room, Westerdam’s sophisticated flagship restaurant, offering breakfast, lunch or a superb multi-course dinner. For something casual, head to Lido Market, where you'll find a wide range of food options to satisfy every taste, or to indulge in that tasty late-night snack. The laid-back Dive-In serves up the best burgers at sea, and Nathan's famous gourmet hotdogs are not to be missed. For those leisurely mornings, treat yourself to breakfast in bed with 24-hour in-room dining — all included in your cruise.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 11: Phu My (Ho Chi Minh City), Vietnam**

After a relaxing day at sea, arrive in the bustling port of Phu My, a short jaunt from the jewel of Vietnam — Ho Chi Minh City. Boasting colonial architecture, delicious street food and flourishing coffee culture, Ho Chi Minh City is a fascinating mix of ageless beauty and ancient culture. On its streets, French colonial architecture mixes with modern Asian influences, providing a diverse backdrop for the many motorbikes, scooters, pagodas, and street markets.

Get in touch with Ho Chi Minh’s French roots with a visit to Saigon Notre Dame Basilica, a grand example of the colonial building style. Feast on Vietnamese staples like banh mi sandwiches and pho before taking a stroll to Tortoise Pagoda, a tranquil place of worship for those who practise Buddhism and Taoism. Relics of the Vietnam War can be found at the Remnants Museum, while the medical museum displays a fascinating collection of potions and remedies.

**Day 12: At Sea**

Make the most of MS Westerdam's incredible facilities with a full day at sea.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Days 13–14: Laem Chabang (Bangkok), Thailand**

You'll have plenty of time to explore the splendour of Bangkok, Thailand’s capital and cultural centre, as you dock overnight. Located along the Chao Phraya River, the bustling city is teeming with stunning temples, crowded shops, historic landmarks, unique cultural attractions and thriving nightlife.

Begin your Thai exploration at the Grand Palace and Emerald Buddha before making your way to the National Museum. Make the trek to the Old City to witness the opulent temples of Wat Phra Kaew and Wat Po, as well as the Vimanmek Palace houses –  the world’s largest golden teak building. Keen shoppers will love the bargains in the Banglamphu district and the Klong Toey, in central Bangkok, which features a highly discounted market, offering fresh eel, dried fish, and the lively smells, sights, and sounds of this waterfront-pier area.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 15: At Sea**

Spend your final day aboard the incredible MS Westerdam at leisure. Catch one last show, indulge in sumptuous cuisine or treat yourself to a blissful treatment at the Greenhouse Spa & Salon.

**Meals:** Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

**Accommodation:** Holland America — MS Westerdam

**Day 16: Singapore (Disembarkation)**

After breakfast, bid farewell to Holland America’s MS Westerdam, as your incredible cruise comes to an end in Singapore.

Spend your day in Singapore exploring all this futuristic and thriving metropolis has to offer. Explore the lush green spaces, including the 128-acre botanical gardens – a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Head to the iconic interconnected towers of Marina Bay or visit the canopy bridges of MacRitchie Reservoir Park. Sample Singapore's famed cuisine, wander through the ultra-clean streets, and allow the highly efficient public transport system to take you to some of the most iconic sites before making your own way to Singapore Changi Airport (SIN) to continue your onward journey.
